title: Constitution (Amendment) Act 2025
text:
REPUBLIC OF NAURU 
CONSTITUTION (AMENDMENT) ACT 2025 
_____________________________ 
No. 1 of 2026 
______________________________ 
 
An Act to amend the Constitution of Nauru 1968 and for other related purposes. 
 
Certified: 14 January 2026 
Table of Provisions 
1 Short title ....................................................................................................................................... 2 
2 Commencement ............................................................................................................................ 2 
3 Amendment of the Constitution of Nauru 1968 ............................................................................. 2 
4 Amendment of Article 19 ............................................................................................................... 2

2 
 
Enacted by the Parliament of Nauru as follows: 
1 Short title 
This Act may be cited as the Constitution (Amendment) Act 2025. 
2 Commencement 
This Act commences on the date it is certified by the Speaker. 
3 Amendment of the Constitution of Nauru 1968 
The Constitution of Nauru 1968 is amended by the provisions of this Act. 
4 Amendment of Article 19 
Article 19 is amended by deleting ‘seven’ and substituting with ‘eight’.
